chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5328 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13.05.2025 Mr. Shafqat Zaman, advocate for petitioner. R.D.Kalhoro, Asstt.Attorney General. Mr. Abdul Samad Khan advocate for NADRA. ------ Learned counsel for NADRA has filed comments, stating that the petitioner was by birth Muslim and has converted recently to Christianity which is against injunctions of Islam. Be that as it may, there is no law allowing NADRA to stop a person from changing his religion; and issuing him CNIC accordingly, if he is a Pakistani Citizen, therefore, NADRA is directed to act according to law and redress grievance of the petitioner in 15 days. The Petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
